passage_title: Alfred Wegener: science, exploration and the theory of continental drift

sentences.sentence:
Introduction
This is a book about the life and scientific work of Alfred Wegener, whose reputation today rests with his theory of continental displacements, better known as 'continental drift'.
sentences.translation: 引言：本书讲述阿尔弗雷德·魏格纳的一生和科学工作；如今他的声誉主要建立在他的大陆位移理论之上，这一理论更广为人知的名称是“大陆漂移”。

structure.text: Introduction
This is a book about the life and scientific work of Alfred Wegener
This
is a book about the life and scientific work of Alfred Wegener
whose reputation today rests with his theory of continental displacements
better known as 'continental drift'

difficult_points: Introduction 是段内小标题，理解时要和后面的介绍性句子一起看。
whose 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 Wegener 如今声誉的来源。
better known as 'continental drift' 是过去分词短语，后置解释 continental displacements 的通俗名称。

sentences.sentence: Wegener proposed this theory in 1912 and developed it extensively for nearly 20 years.
sentences.translation: 魏格纳在1912年提出了这一理论，并在近20年的时间里对其进行了广泛发展。

structure.text: Wegener
proposed this theory in 1912
and developed it extensively for nearly 20 years
for nearly 20 years

difficult_points: proposed 和 developed 共用主语 Wegener，表示提出理论后又长期完善。
it 指代前面的 this theory，不能理解为新的研究对象。
for nearly 20 years 表示持续时间，强调理论发展的长期性。

sentences.sentence: His book on the subject, The Origin of Continents and Oceans, went through four editions and was the focus of an international controversy in his lifetime and for some years after his death.
sentences.translation: 他关于这一主题的著作《大陆与海洋的起源》出了四个版本，并且在他生前以及去世后的几年里一直是国际争议的焦点。

structure.text: His book on the subject
The Origin of Continents and Oceans
went through four editions
and was the focus of an international controversy
in his lifetime and for some years after his death

difficult_points: The Origin of Continents and Oceans 是插入同位语，说明 his book 的书名。
went through four editions 表示经历了四次版本出版，不是“走过四个编辑”。
was the focus of an international controversy 强调这本书成为国际争议中心。

expressions.text: the focus of an international controversy

sentences.sentence: Wegener's basic idea was that many mysteries about the Earth's history could be solved if one supposed that the continents moved laterally, rather than supposing that they remained fixed in place.
sentences.translation: 魏格纳的基本想法是：如果假设大陆是横向移动的，而不是假设它们固定在原地，那么关于地球历史的许多谜团就可以得到解释。

structure.text: Wegener's basic idea
was
that many mysteries about the Earth's history could be solved
if one supposed that the continents moved laterally
that the continents moved laterally
rather than supposing that they remained fixed in place

difficult_points: was 后的 that 从句说明 basic idea 的具体内容，是表语从句。
could be solved 是情态动词加被动语态，表示“可以被解决”。
if one supposed... 是条件状语从句，其中 one 泛指任何研究者或读者。
rather than supposing... 对比两种假设：大陆横向移动与固定不动。

sentences.sentence: Wegener showed in great detail how such continental movements were plausible and how they worked, using evidence from a large number of sciences including geology, geophysics, paleontology, and climatology.
sentences.translation: 魏格纳非常详细地说明了这种大陆运动为何可信以及它们如何运作，并使用了来自大量学科的证据，包括地质学、地球物理学、古生物学和气候学。

structure.text: Wegener
showed in great detail
how such continental movements were plausible
and how they worked
using evidence from a large number of sciences
including geology, geophysics, paleontology, and climatology

difficult_points: 两个 how 从句并列作 showed 的宾语，分别解释“是否合理”和“如何运作”。
using evidence... 是现在分词短语，说明魏格纳论证时使用的方法。
including 后列举多个学科，说明 evidence 来源范围很广。

sentences.sentence: Wegener's idea – that the continents move – is at the heart of the theory that guides Earth sciences today: namely plate tectonics.
sentences.translation: 魏格纳的想法——大陆会移动——正是如今指导地球科学的理论的核心，也就是板块构造理论的核心。

structure.text: Wegener's idea
that the continents move
is at the heart of the theory
that guides Earth sciences today
namely plate tectonics

difficult_points: 破折号中的 that the continents move 是同位语从句，解释 Wegener's idea 的内容。
is at the heart of 表示“处于……核心”，不是字面上的心脏位置。
that guides Earth sciences today 是定语从句，修饰 the theory。
namely plate tectonics 用冒号补充说明 the theory 的具体名称。

sentences.sentence: Plate tectonics is in many respects quite different from Wegener's proposal, in the same way that modern evolutionary theory is very different from the ideas Charles Darwin proposed in the 1850s about biological evolution.
sentences.translation: 板块构造理论在许多方面都与魏格纳的设想相当不同，就像现代进化理论与查尔斯·达尔文在19世纪50年代提出的关于生物进化的观点非常不同一样。

structure.text: Plate tectonics
is in many respects quite different from Wegener's proposal
in the same way that modern evolutionary theory is very different from the ideas Charles Darwin proposed in the 1850s about biological evolution
that modern evolutionary theory is very different from the ideas Charles Darwin proposed in the 1850s about biological evolution
Charles Darwin proposed in the 1850s about biological evolution

difficult_points: in many respects 插入说明差异体现在多个方面。
in the same way that... 引出类比，把板块构造与现代进化论的关系作比较。
the ideas Charles Darwin proposed... 中省略了关系代词 that/which。
这句话强调“继承关系不等于内容高度相同”。

sentences.sentence: Yet plate tectonics is a descendant of Alfred Wegener's theory of continental drift, in quite the same way that modern evolutionary theory is a descendant of Darwin's theory of natural selection.
sentences.translation: 然而，板块构造理论是阿尔弗雷德·魏格纳大陆漂移理论的后继理论，正如现代进化理论是达尔文自然选择理论的后继理论一样。

structure.text: Yet
plate tectonics
is a descendant of Alfred Wegener's theory of continental drift
in quite the same way that modern evolutionary theory is a descendant of Darwin's theory of natural selection

difficult_points: Yet 表示转折：虽然差异很大，但二者仍有继承关系。
a descendant of 在这里指理论上的后继或发展，不是血缘后代。
in quite the same way that... 再次用进化论作类比，帮助说明理论继承关系。

sentences.sentence: When I started writing about Wegener's life and work, one of the most intriguing things about him for me was that, although he came up with a theory on continental drift, he was not a geologist.
sentences.translation: 当我开始写魏格纳的生平和工作时，对我来说，他身上最耐人寻味的一点是：尽管他提出了大陆漂移理论，但他并不是地质学家。

structure.text: When I started writing about Wegener's life and work
one of the most intriguing things about him for me
was
that, although he came up with a theory on continental drift, he was not a geologist
although he came up with a theory on continental drift

difficult_points: When 引导时间状语从句，交代作者写作时的发现背景。
one of the most intriguing things 是主语中心结构，真正主语不是 him。
was 后的 that 从句说明“最耐人寻味的事情”是什么。
although 从句形成让步关系：提出大陆漂移理论的人却不是地质学家。

sentences.sentence: He trained as an astronomer and pursued a career in atmospheric physics.
sentences.translation: 他接受的是天文学家的训练，并从事大气物理学方面的职业。

structure.text: He
trained as an astronomer
and pursued a career in atmospheric physics
in atmospheric physics

difficult_points: trained as 表示“接受……身份/方向的训练”，不是普通的训练某人。
pursued a career in 表示从事某一领域的职业，与前面的 trained 并列。
atmospheric physics 是大气物理学，解释他并非地质学背景。

sentences.sentence: When he proposed the theory of continental displacements in 1912, he was a lecturer in physics and astronomy at the University of Marburg, in southern Germany.
sentences.translation: 1912年他提出大陆位移理论时，他是德国南部马尔堡大学的一名物理学和天文学讲师。

structure.text: When he proposed the theory of continental displacements in 1912
he
was a lecturer in physics and astronomy
at the University of Marburg
in southern Germany

difficult_points: When 从句交代提出理论时的时间背景。
lecturer in physics and astronomy 说明他的职位和学科领域。
at the University of Marburg 与 in southern Germany 分别说明机构和地理位置。

sentences.sentence: However, he was not an 'unknown'.
sentences.translation: 然而，他并不是一个“无名之辈”。

structure.text: However
he
was not an 'unknown'

difficult_points: However 表示转折，承接前文“他不是地质学家”但并不等于默默无闻。
'unknown' 加引号，表示“无名之辈”这一称呼，而非单纯形容词 unknown。
not an 'unknown' 是名词化用法，指他已有一定知名度。

sentences.sentence: In 1906 he had set a world record (with his brother Kurt) for time aloft in a hot-air balloon: 52 hours.
sentences.translation: 1906年，他和弟弟库尔特一起创造了热气球滞空时间的世界纪录：52小时。

structure.text: he
had set a world record
with his brother Kurt
for time aloft in a hot-air balloon
52 hours

difficult_points: had set 是过去完成时，用来回顾他在提出理论前已经取得的成就。
for time aloft in a hot-air balloon 说明纪录的项目是热气球滞空时间。
冒号后的 52 hours 补充说明世界纪录的具体数值。

sentences.sentence: Between 1906 and 1908 he had taken part in a highly publicized and extremely dangerous expedition to the coast of northeast Greenland.
sentences.translation: 1906年至1908年间，他参加了一次备受关注且极其危险的探险，目的地是格陵兰东北部海岸。

structure.text: Between 1906 and 1908
he
had taken part in a highly publicized and extremely dangerous expedition
to the coast of northeast Greenland

difficult_points: had taken part in 仍是过去完成时，继续列举他此前的经历。
highly publicized 和 extremely dangerous 并列修饰 expedition。
to the coast of northeast Greenland 表示探险前往的地点。

sentences.sentence: He had also made a name for himself amongst a small circle of meteorologists and atmospheric physicists in Germany as the author of a textbook, Thermodynamics of the Atmosphere (1911), and of a number of interesting scientific papers.
sentences.translation: 他还以一本教科书《大气热力学》（1911年）以及若干有趣科学论文的作者身份，在德国一小群气象学家和大气物理学家中为自己赢得了名声。

structure.text: He
had also made a name for himself
amongst a small circle of meteorologists and atmospheric physicists in Germany
as the author of a textbook
Thermodynamics of the Atmosphere (1911)
and of a number of interesting scientific papers

difficult_points: had also made a name for himself 表示“已经赢得名声”，不是字面上的“造名字”。
amongst... 说明他的名声所在的专业圈子，范围并不广大。
as the author of... 说明他出名的身份和原因。
and of a number of... 与 of a textbook 并列，共同依附于 author。

sentences.sentence: As important as Wegener's work on continental drift has turned out to be, it was largely a sideline to his interest in atmospheric physics, geophysics, and paleoclimatology, and thus I have been at great pains to put Wegener's work on continental drift in the larger context of his other scientific work, and in the even larger context of atmospheric sciences in his lifetime.
sentences.translation: 尽管魏格纳关于大陆漂移的工作后来证明非常重要，但它在很大程度上只是他对大气物理学、地球物理学和古气候学兴趣的副线；因此，我一直煞费苦心地把他的大陆漂移工作放到他其他科学工作的更大背景中，并进一步放到他所处时代大气科学的更大背景中。

structure.text: As important as Wegener's work on continental drift has turned out to be
it
was largely a sideline to his interest in atmospheric physics, geophysics, and paleoclimatology
and thus I have been at great pains
to put Wegener's work on continental drift in the larger context of his other scientific work
and in the even larger context of atmospheric sciences in his lifetime

difficult_points: As important as... 是让步结构，意思是“尽管……很重要”。
it 指代 Wegener's work on continental drift，而不是整个人。
a sideline to his interest 表示大陆漂移只是他主要兴趣之外的副线。
to put... in the larger context 说明作者写作时努力采取的解释框架。

sentences.sentence: This is a 'continental drift book' only to the extent that Wegener was interested in that topic and later became famous for it.
sentences.translation: 这本书只有在魏格纳对该主题感兴趣并后来因此成名这一程度上，才算是一本“大陆漂移之书”。

structure.text: This
is a 'continental drift book'
only to the extent that Wegener was interested in that topic and later became famous for it
that Wegener was interested in that topic and later became famous for it

difficult_points: only to the extent that 限定了这本书被称为“大陆漂移之书”的程度。
that topic 指 continental drift，it 也指代该主题。
became famous for it 表明大陆漂移是他后来成名的原因之一。

sentences.sentence: My treatment of his other scientific work is no less detailed, though I certainly have devoted more attention to the reception of his ideas on continental displacement, as they were much more controversial than his other work.
sentences.translation: 我对他其他科学工作的处理同样详尽，不过我确实把更多注意力放在他的大陆位移思想被接受的情况上，因为这些思想比他的其他工作更具争议。

structure.text: My treatment of his other scientific work
is no less detailed
though I certainly have devoted more attention to the reception of his ideas on continental displacement
as they were much more controversial than his other work

difficult_points: no less detailed 表示“一样详细”，不是“不那么详细”。
though 引导让步，说明尽管其他工作写得详细，大陆位移部分仍获得更多关注。
reception 在此指观点被学界接受、回应或争论的情况。
they 指 his ideas on continental displacement。

expressions.meaning_zh: 他的思想被接受和回应的情况

sentences.sentence: Readers interested in the specific detail of Wegener's career will see that he often stopped pursuing a given line of investigation (sometimes for years on end), only to pick it up later.
sentences.translation: 对魏格纳职业生涯具体细节感兴趣的读者会看到，他常常停止追寻某一条研究线索（有时一停就是多年），后来却又重新拾起它。

structure.text: Readers interested in the specific detail of Wegener's career
interested in the specific detail of Wegener's career
will see
that he often stopped pursuing a given line of investigation (sometimes for years on end)
only to pick it up later

difficult_points: interested in... 是后置分词短语，修饰 Readers。
that 引导 see 的宾语从句，说明读者会发现的内容。
for years on end 表示连续多年，强调中断时间很长。
only to pick it up later 表示出乎预期的结果：后来又重新开始。

sentences.sentence: I have tried to provide guideposts to his rapidly shifting interests by characterizing different phases of his life as careers in different sciences, which is reflected in the titles of the chapters.
sentences.translation: 我试图通过把他人生的不同阶段描述为不同科学领域的职业生涯，为他快速变化的兴趣提供路标；这一点也体现在各章标题中。

structure.text: I
have tried to provide guideposts to his rapidly shifting interests
to provide guideposts to his rapidly shifting interests
by characterizing different phases of his life as careers in different sciences
which is reflected in the titles of the chapters

difficult_points: have tried to provide 表示作者写作上的努力和安排。
by characterizing... 说明提供 guideposts 的方法。
as careers in different sciences 表示把人生阶段界定为不同科学领域的职业。
which 指代前面整件事，而不是某一个单独名词。

sentences.sentence: Thus, the index should be a sufficient guide for those interested in a particular aspect of Wegener's life but perhaps not all of it.
sentences.translation: 因此，对于那些只对魏格纳生平某个特定方面感兴趣、但也许并不想了解全部内容的人来说，索引应该足以起到指南作用。

structure.text: Thus
the index
should be a sufficient guide
for those interested in a particular aspect of Wegener's life but perhaps not all of it
interested in a particular aspect of Wegener's life but perhaps not all of it

difficult_points: Thus 连接上文的章节标题安排，表示由此得出的阅读建议。
should be 在这里表示推断或预期，不是强制义务。
those interested in... 中 those 指一类读者，后面分词短语修饰。
it 指 Wegener's life，而不是 index。

sentences.sentence: My own feeling, however, is that the parts do not make as much sense on their own as do all of his activities taken together.
sentences.translation: 然而，我个人的感觉是，这些部分单独来看，并不像把他的所有活动合在一起看那样有意义。

structure.text: My own feeling
however
is
that the parts do not make as much sense on their own as do all of his activities taken together
taken together

difficult_points: however 插入主语和系动词之间，表示作者要转向自己的看法。
that 从句作表语，完整说明 My own feeling 的内容。
as much sense... as do... 是比较结构，do 代替 make sense。
taken together 后置修饰 all of his activities，表示“合在一起看”。

sentences.sentence: In this respect I urge readers to try to experience Wegener's life as he lived it, with all the interruptions, changes of mind, and renewed efforts this entailed.
sentences.translation: 在这一点上，我敦促读者试着像魏格纳本人那样去体验他的一生，包括其中所有的中断、想法改变以及随之而来的重新努力。

structure.text: In this respect
I
urge readers to try to experience Wegener's life
to try to experience Wegener's life
as he lived it
with all the interruptions, changes of mind, and renewed efforts this entailed

difficult_points: urge readers to... 是“敦促某人做某事”的结构。
as he lived it 表示“按照他实际经历它的方式”，it 指 Wegener's life。
with all... 补充说明体验其人生时应包括的复杂变化。
this entailed 中 this 指前面 Wegener's life as he lived it 这一整体。

sentences.sentence: Wegener left behind a few published works but, as was standard practice, these reported the results of his work – not the journey he took to reach that point.
sentences.translation: 魏格纳留下了少量已发表的作品，但按照当时的惯例，这些作品报告的是他的研究结果，而不是他为达到那些结果所经历的过程。

structure.text: Wegener
left behind a few published works
but, as was standard practice, these reported the results of his work
as was standard practice
not the journey he took to reach that point
he took to reach that point

difficult_points: left behind 表示留下资料或作品，而不是空间上的“落在后面”。
as was standard practice 是插入状语从句，说明这种写法符合当时惯例。
破折号后的 not... 与 the results of his work 对比，强调缺少研究过程记录。
the journey he took 中省略关系代词，修饰 journey。

sentences.sentence: Only a few hundred of the many thousands of letters he wrote and received in his lifetime have survived and he didn't keep notebooks or diaries that recorded his life and activities.
sentences.translation: 他一生中写出和收到的数千封信中，只有几百封保存了下来，而且他没有保留记录自己生活和活动的笔记本或日记。

structure.text: Only a few hundred of the many thousands of letters he wrote and received in his lifetime
he wrote and received in his lifetime
have survived
and he didn't keep notebooks or diaries
that recorded his life and activities

difficult_points: Only a few hundred of the many thousands 强调保存下来的比例很小。
letters he wrote and received 中省略关系代词 that/which。
have survived 是现在完成时，表示这些信件保存到了现在。
that recorded his life and activities 修饰 notebooks or diaries。

sentences.sentence: He was not active (with a few exceptions) in scientific societies, and did not seek to find influence or advance his ideas through professional contacts and politics, spending most of his time at home in his study reading and writing, or in the field collecting observations.
sentences.translation: 他在科学社团中并不活跃（少数例外除外），也没有试图通过专业人脉和政治活动来获得影响力或推动自己的观点，而是把大部分时间花在家中书房阅读写作，或在野外收集观测资料。

structure.text: He
was not active (with a few exceptions) in scientific societies
and did not seek to find influence or advance his ideas through professional contacts and politics
to find influence or advance his ideas
spending most of his time at home in his study reading and writing
or in the field collecting observations

difficult_points: with a few exceptions 是插入补充，避免把“不活跃”说成绝对没有例外。
seek to find influence or advance his ideas 中 find 和 advance 并列。
through professional contacts and politics 表示他没有借助专业关系和政治手段。
spending... 是现在分词短语，说明他实际投入时间的方式。

sentences.sentence: Some famous scientists, such as Newton, Darwin, and Einstein, left mountains of written material behind, hundreds of notebooks and letters numbering in the tens of thousands.
sentences.translation: 一些著名科学家，如牛顿、达尔文和爱因斯坦，留下了大量书面材料，包括数百本笔记本和数以万计的信件。

structure.text: Some famous scientists
such as Newton, Darwin, and Einstein
left mountains of written material behind
hundreds of notebooks and letters numbering in the tens of thousands
numbering in the tens of thousands

difficult_points: such as... 是插入举例，说明 famous scientists 包括哪些人。
left... behind 表示留下资料，behind 放在宾语后形成短语动词结构。
mountains of written material 是夸张表达，强调材料数量巨大。
numbering in the tens of thousands 后置修饰 letters。

sentences.sentence: Others, like Michael Faraday, left extensive journals of their thoughts and speculations, parallel to their scientific notebooks.
sentences.translation: 另一些人，如迈克尔·法拉第，则留下了大量记录他们思想和推测的日记，这些日记与他们的科学笔记并行存在。

structure.text: Others
like Michael Faraday
left extensive journals of their thoughts and speculations
parallel to their scientific notebooks

difficult_points: Others 与上一句 Some famous scientists 对应，表示另一类科学家。
like Michael Faraday 是举例插入语，不是谓语动词。
journals of their thoughts and speculations 表示记录思想和推测的日记。
parallel to their scientific notebooks 补充说明这些日记与科学笔记并列存在。

sentences.sentence: The more such material a scientist leaves behind, the better chance a biographer has of forming an accurate picture of how a scientist's ideas took shape and evolved.
sentences.translation: 一位科学家留下的这类材料越多，传记作者就越有机会准确描绘出这位科学家的思想是如何形成并演变的。

structure.text: The more such material a scientist leaves behind
the better chance a biographer has
of forming an accurate picture
of how a scientist's ideas took shape and evolved
how a scientist's ideas took shape and evolved

difficult_points: The more..., the better... 是“越……越……”的比较结构。
leaves behind 再次表示留下可供研究的材料。
has of forming... 中 of 引出 chance 的具体内容。
how 从句说明传记作者要形成的 accurate picture 的对象。

expressions.meaning_zh: 准确描绘；形成准确认识

sentences.sentence: I am firmly of the opinion that most of us, Wegener included, are not in any real sense the authors of our own lives.
sentences.translation: 我坚定地认为，我们大多数人，包括魏格纳在内，在任何真实意义上都不是自己人生的作者。

structure.text: I
am firmly of the opinion
that most of us, Wegener included, are not in any real sense the authors of our own lives
Wegener included
not in any real sense

difficult_points: be of the opinion that 是正式表达，意思是“认为”。
that 从句说明作者观点的具体内容。
Wegener included 是插入语，表示魏格纳也包括在 most of us 中。
the authors of our own lives 是比喻说法，指能否主宰自己的人生叙事。

expressions.text: the authors of our own lives
expressions.meaning_zh: 自己人生的作者；人生的主宰者

sentences.sentence: We plan, think, and act, often with apparent freedom, but most of the time our lives 'happen to us', and we only retrospectively turn this happenstance into a coherent narrative of fulfilled intentions.
sentences.translation: 我们会计划、思考和行动，而且常常看起来拥有自由；但大多数时候，生活是“发生在我们身上”的，我们只是事后才把这种偶然性转化成一个关于意图实现的连贯叙事。

structure.text: We plan, think, and act
often with apparent freedom
but most of the time our lives 'happen to us'
and we only retrospectively turn this happenstance into a coherent narrative of fulfilled intentions
turn this happenstance into a coherent narrative of fulfilled intentions

difficult_points: plan, think, and act 三个动词并列，描述人看似主动安排人生。
but 引出转折，指出大多数时候生活并不完全受我们掌控。
'happen to us' 加引号，强调生活像事件一样降临到我们身上。
retrospectively 表示事后回看，再把偶然事件整理成叙事。

sentences.sentence: This book, therefore, is a story both of the life and scientific work that Alfred Wegener planned and intended and of the life and scientific work that actually 'happened to him'.
sentences.translation: 因此，本书讲述的是两方面的故事：一方面是阿尔弗雷德·魏格纳所计划和意图中的人生与科学工作，另一方面是那些实际上“发生在他身上”的人生与科学工作。

structure.text: This book
therefore
is a story both of the life and scientific work
that Alfred Wegener planned and intended
and of the life and scientific work
that actually 'happened to him'

difficult_points: therefore 插入主语和谓语之间，承接前一句关于人生偶然性的观点。
both of... and of... 构成并列，说明这本书讲述两个层面的故事。
两个 that 从句分别修饰两组 life and scientific work。
'happened to him' 延续上一句的比喻，指实际降临到魏格纳身上的经历。

sentences.sentence: These are, as I think you will soon see, not always the same thing.
sentences.translation: 正如我认为你很快会看到的，这两者并不总是一回事。

structure.text: These
are
as I think you will soon see
I think
you will soon see
not always the same thing

difficult_points: These 指前一句中两种人生和科学工作：计划中的与实际发生的。
as I think you will soon see 是插入从句，预告读者会在书中看到这一点。
not always 表示部分否定，即并非总是相同，而不是完全不同。

expressions.text: as I think you will soon see
expressions.meaning_zh: 正如我认为你很快会看到的
